title: MCP-Host Provider Manifest
description: Single source of truth for a hosted MCP. The gateway derives the route mount, OAuth scopes, per-tool price map, Postgres schema + RLS policy, rate limits, the syndication server.json, and the storefront listing from this one file. Nothing in this list may be configured elsewhere.

id.description: URL-safe provider id. Becomes /mcp/<id> and the <id>.* Postgres schema.

discipline.description: Short kebab tag for the storefront category, e.g. sec-filings-intelligence.

demo.description: True for sample/reference providers that serve example data and are not a real hosted customer. Badged as 'demo' on the storefront.

owner_namespace.description: Reverse-DNS namespace for official-registry publishing, e.g. io.github.StanislavBG. Ownership is verified once (GitHub mcpName / DNS TXT). Last segment is the GitHub username (case preserved).

transport.description: MCP wire transport. The platform standard is streamable-http.

scopes.description: All OAuth scopes this provider's tools reference. Every tool.scope MUST appear here.

postgres_schema.description: RLS-isolated schema name. Conventionally equals id (or a short alias). Provider migrations live here.

artifacts.description: Large/vector/blob data pushed via the upload API to per-provider object storage and mounted read-only at runtime.

tools.description: Every MCP tool the provider exposes. Names/schemas are enforced against the Provider SDK @tool methods at boot.

name.description: MCP tool name. Dotted namespaces allowed (e.g. panels.trending).

description.description: Human/LLM-facing tool description. Scored by TDQS at validate time; aim for >= 40 chars stating what the tool does and any constraints.

scope.description: OAuth scope required to call this tool. MUST be listed in auth.scopes.

price_usdc.description: Per-call price. Free-during-alpha values: $0.00, $0, 0, or empty string.

annotations.description: MCP tool annotations used for client planning and quality scoring.

input_schema_ref.description: JSON Pointer / $ref to the tool's input JSON Schema (Pydantic model with extra=forbid).

syndication.description: Which external registries mcp-host syndicate publishes to. The official registry is the canonical feed the others auto-ingest.
